moments.title: World Cup Final Stages
moments.blurb: The FIFA World Cup 2026 reaches its climax this week, with the bronze final on Saturday and the grand final on Sunday.

angles.name: Semifinals Wrap
angles.copy: What a week of World Cup action! With the semi-finals done, who are you backing for the Bronze Final and the big one on Sunday?

angles.name: Final Countdown
angles.copy: The biggest game in football is just days away! Get ready for the FIFA World Cup 2026 Final this Sunday. Who lifts the trophy?

moments.title: The Open Championship Tees Off
moments.blurb: The 154th Open Championship begins tomorrow, July 16th, at Royal Birkdale Golf Club in Southport, England, running until Sunday.

angles.name: Major Golf Starts
angles.copy: It's here! The Open Championship 2026 kicks off tomorrow at Royal Birkdale. Who's your pick for the Claret Jug?

angles.name: Birkdale Ready
angles.copy: Royal Birkdale is primed for The Open! Get ready for four days of world-class golf starting Thursday.

moments.title: Latitude Festival Returns
moments.blurb: Latitude Festival 2026 takes over Henham Park in Suffolk from July 23-26, featuring headliners David Byrne, Teddy Swims, and Lewis Capaldi.

angles.name: Suffolk Festival Buzz
angles.copy: Latitude Festival is just a week away! Ready for a weekend of music, comedy & arts at Henham Park?

angles.name: Who to see at Latitude
angles.copy: David Byrne, Teddy Swims, Lewis Capaldi... who are you most excited to catch at Latitude next week?

moments.title: Richard Ashcroft Live in Cardiff
moments.blurb: Former The Verve frontman Richard Ashcroft plays a highly anticipated show at Cardiff Castle tomorrow, Thursday July 16th.

angles.name: Ashcroft in Wales
angles.copy: The iconic Richard Ashcroft takes to the stage at Cardiff Castle tomorrow! Who's heading to see the legend?

angles.name: Cardiff Castle Gigs
angles.copy: Another massive name for Cardiff Castle! Richard Ashcroft plays tomorrow. What's your favourite Verve track?

moments.title: Self Esteem at Cardiff Castle
moments.blurb: Critically acclaimed artist Self Esteem brings her dynamic show to Cardiff Castle on Friday, July 24th.

angles.name: Self Esteem Live
angles.copy: Self Esteem is set to light up Cardiff Castle next Friday! Get ready for an unforgettable night.

angles.name: Cardiff Gigs
angles.copy: Rebecca Lucy Taylor, aka Self Esteem, is coming to Cardiff! Who's excited for her show at the Castle?

moments.title: The Wombats Invade Cardiff
moments.blurb: Indie-pop favourites The Wombats are playing Cardiff Castle on Saturday, July 25th.

angles.name: Wombats in Wales
angles.copy: The Wombats are bringing their infectious energy to Cardiff Castle next Saturday! Which track are you hoping to hear?

angles.name: Indie Anthems
angles.copy: Get ready for a night of indie anthems as The Wombats play Cardiff Castle on July 25th!

moments.title: Wales Airshow Soars Over Swansea
moments.blurb: The spectacular Wales Airshow returns to Swansea Bay on July 25th and 26th, offering a free weekend of aerial displays.

angles.name: Airshow Weekend
angles.copy: Mark your calendars! The Wales Airshow is back in Swansea Bay next weekend, July 25-26. Get ready to look up!

angles.name: Free Family Fun
angles.copy: Fancy a free, thrilling weekend? The Wales Airshow in Swansea promises incredible aerial displays for all the family next Saturday and Sunday.

moments.title: International Snowdon Race
moments.blurb: The challenging International Snowdon Race takes place in Llanberis, Wales, this Saturday, July 18th.

angles.name: Snowdon Challenge
angles.copy: Good luck to all runners tackling the legendary International Snowdon Race this Saturday! A true test of endurance.

angles.name: Llanberis Event
angles.copy: Llanberis is buzzing this weekend for the International Snowdon Race. Who's heading out to support the athletes?

moments.title: Kingsbridge Fair Week
moments.blurb: Kingsbridge Fair Week kicks off this Saturday, July 18th, offering a week of free events including live music, fireworks, and a carnival.

angles.name: Fair Week Fun
angles.copy: Kingsbridge Fair Week starts this Saturday! Get ready for a week of carnival fun, music and fireworks.

angles.name: Devon Community Event
angles.copy: Looking for family fun in Devon? Kingsbridge Fair Week runs from July 18-25 with something for everyone!

moments.title: Clovelly Maritime Festival
moments.blurb: The picturesque village of Clovelly hosts its Maritime Festival this Sunday, July 19th, featuring boat races and family entertainment.

angles.name: Coastal Celebration
angles.copy: Head to Clovelly this Sunday for their Maritime Festival! Expect boat races, fun activities and stunning views.

angles.name: Devon Day Out
angles.copy: Under 16s in maritime fancy dress get free entry to Clovelly Maritime Festival this Sunday! Perfect family day out.

moments.title: Fore Street Flea in Exeter
moments.blurb: Exeter's Fore Street Flea returns this Sunday, July 19th, celebrating independent spirit with vintage finds, local makers, and street food.

angles.name: Exeter Flea Market
angles.copy: Get down to Fore Street Flea this Sunday for unique finds, local crafts and a great atmosphere in Exeter's West Quarter!

angles.name: Sunday Shopping
angles.copy: Support local and enjoy the buzz at Fore Street Flea this Sunday in Exeter! Street food, music and independent stalls await.

moments.title: Jazz on the Quay, Exeter
moments.blurb: Enjoy free live jazz on Exeter's historic quayside this Sunday, July 19th, offering the perfect summer soundtrack.

angles.name: Sunday Jazz Vibes
angles.copy: Relax by the water this Sunday with free live Jazz on the Quay in Exeter! A perfect way to spend a summer afternoon.

angles.name: Exeter Music
angles.copy: Smooth rhythms and laid-back vibes: Jazz on the Quay is back this Sunday in Exeter. Don't miss it!

moments.title: New UK TV Shows This July
moments.blurb: July brings new British dramas and comedies to screens, including the moody thriller 'The Dark' on ITV and Diane Morgan's 'Ann Droid' on BBC One and iPlayer.

angles.name: Must-Watch TV
angles.copy: Plenty of new British TV to get stuck into this July! What are you watching – 'The Dark' on ITV or 'Ann Droid' on BBC?

angles.name: July TV Picks
angles.copy: From gripping thrillers to quirky comedy, British TV is delivering this month. What's on your watchlist?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Carlos Santana
moments.blurb: Legendary guitarist Carlos Santana, known for hits like 'Smooth' and 'Black Magic Woman', celebrates his 79th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Guitar Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to the one and only Carlos Santana! What's your favourite riff from the guitar legend?

angles.name: Santana's Hits
angles.copy: Celebrating Carlos Santana's 79th birthday on July 20th! Time to crank up 'Smooth' and 'Oye Como Va'!

moments.title: Happy 70th Birthday, Paul Cook
moments.blurb: Paul Cook, the influential drummer of punk pioneers Sex Pistols, turns 70 on July 20th.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 70th Birthday to Paul Cook, the powerhouse behind the Sex Pistols' iconic sound! What's your favourite punk anthem?

angles.name: Sex Pistols Drummer
angles.copy: Celebrating Paul Cook's 70th on July 20th! The drummer who helped define a generation of punk rock.

moments.title: Happy 60th Birthday, Stone Gossard
moments.blurb: Pearl Jam guitarist and co-founder Stone Gossard celebrates his 60th birthday on July 20th.

angles.name: Grunge Guitarist
angles.copy: Happy 60th Birthday to Pearl Jam's Stone Gossard! What's your go-to Pearl Jam track?

angles.name: Pearl Jam Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating Stone Gossard's 60th on July 20th! A founding member of grunge royalty, Pearl Jam.

moments.title: Happy 78th Birthday, Yusuf / Cat Stevens
moments.blurb: The iconic singer-songwriter Yusuf Islam, formerly known as Cat Stevens, turns 78 on July 21st.

angles.name: Folk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 78th Birthday to the legendary Yusuf Islam, also known as Cat Stevens! What's your favourite song from him?

angles.name: Cat Stevens Classics
angles.copy: Celebrating Yusuf / Cat Stevens' 78th birthday on July 21st! Time to listen to some timeless classics.

moments.title: Happy 85th Birthday, George Clinton
moments.blurb: Funk music pioneer George Clinton, leader of Parliament-Funkadelic, celebrates his 85th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Funk Master
angles.copy: Happy 85th Birthday to the incomparable George Clinton! Get down with the funk legend's greatest hits today.

angles.name: P-Funk King
angles.copy: Celebrating George Clinton's 85th on July 22nd! The mastermind behind Parliament-Funkadelic. What's your favourite P-Funk jam?

moments.title: Happy 79th Birthday, Don Henley
moments.blurb: Don Henley, co-founder, drummer, and vocalist of The Eagles, turns 79 on July 22nd.

angles.name: Eagles Legend
angles.copy: Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley! Celebrate the Eagles frontman with some classic rock anthems today.

angles.name: Hotel California Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a very Happy 79th Birthday to Don Henley on July 22nd! Co-founder of The Eagles and voice of countless hits.

moments.title: Happy 34th Birthday, Selena Gomez
moments.blurb: Pop superstar and actress Selena Gomez celebrates her 34th birthday on July 22nd.

angles.name: Pop Princess
angles.copy: Happy 34th Birthday to the incredible Selena Gomez! What's your favourite track from her?

angles.name: Birthday Shoutout
angles.copy: Wishing Selena Gomez a very Happy 34th Birthday on July 22nd! Celebrate with her biggest hits!

moments.title: Happy 61st Birthday, Slash
moments.blurb: Guns N' Roses lead guitarist and rock icon Slash celebrates his 61st birthday on July 23rd.

angles.name: Guitar Hero
angles.copy: Happy 61st Birthday to the legendary Slash! Time to crank up those iconic Guns N' Roses riffs.

angles.name: Guns N' Roses Icon
angles.copy: Wishing a rockin' 61st Birthday to Slash on July 23rd! What's your favourite GNR solo?
